title: chionanthus bumelioides subsp. bumelioides
intro: Chionanthus bumelioides subsp. bumelioides, also known as the Mexican fringetree, is a deciduous shrub native to eastern Mexico. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. In herbal preparations, Chionanthus bumelioides subsp. bumelioides is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
